title: Stiff Neck and 9 Herbal Creams: A Teacher's Best Friend
description: Melaleuca alternifolia creams, also known as tea tree oil creams, are a natural remedy that can help alleviate stiff neck pain. The active properties in these creams, such as eucalyptol, cineole, and terpinen-4-ol, have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects that can help reduce swelling and ease muscle tension. These constituents also have analgesic and antispasmodic properties, which can help numb the pain and relax the muscles in the neck. When you apply the cream to the affected ...
